meaning: n.鳍,鱼翅,鳍状物,五元纸币vi.猛挥鳍,露鳍于水面的vt.装上翅,切除鳍
examples: Help save the sharks! Shark fin soup is popular in northern China.
Michelle reached out her hand and gently touched the fin of one of the dolphins.
Do they realize that they're killing a whole shark each time they enjoy a bowl of shark fin soup?
The irony is that shark fin is flavorless -- its cartilage has a chewy consistency.
Si vous vous impliquez, avez-vous une chance raisonnable de mettre fin au conflit ?
